text_original: This app is only for male users. You can't play as a straight woman because more than 99% of the chatbots are female and you can't even play as wlw because the chatbot either establishes from the beginning that your character is male or assumes it. The few existing male chatbots are mostly for LGBTQ male users.
text_zh: 此应用仅面向男性用户。你无法以异性恋女性的身份进行游戏，因为超过99%的聊天机器人都是女性；你甚至无法以女同性恋身份进行游戏，因为聊天机器人要么从一开始就设定你的角色是男性，要么默认你是男性。现有的少数男性聊天机器人也大多是为LGBTQ男性用户准备的。
reply_original: I'm truly sorry for this experience. We aim to be inclusive for everyone. You can actually filter characters by gender on the homepage, and you can also create your own custom male or female bots! If a bot assumes your gender incorrectly, please email details to support@fantachat.ai so we can fix the model's logic. We'll do better!
reply_zh: 对于这次体验，我深表歉意。我们的目标是为每个人提供包容性的服务。实际上，您可以在首页按性别筛选角色，也可以创建属于您自己的自定义男性或女性机器人！如果机器人错误地假设了您的性别，请将详细信息发送至 support@fantachat.ai，以便我们修复模型的逻辑。我们会做得更好！
